code:
import io
import string

fn byte_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_at(input, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          let bb = byte_at(input, i)
          if bb >= 48 and bb <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (bb - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      let value = num * sign
      if value % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + value
      end
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
